name: Ashes of Morgravia
short_description: Ashes of Morgravia is a dark fantasy tactical deckbuilder where you move, strike, and adapt using dual decks to survive against necrotic horrors. Uncover lost divine secrets and fight for survival in a world swallowed by eternal night.

name: Sineus Arena Survivors
short_description: Fight hordes and defend your Stronghold in a bullet heaven survivor-like with co-op and tower defense. Gain power-ups every level, collect random artifacts from chests and grow stronger to survive, defeat the boss and claim a top spot on the Sineus Arena leaderboards!

name: Lumina Veil

name: Bingle Bingle

name: Deliverage

name: Playful Day
short_description: Playful Day is an all-ages casual game collection developed by game-loving educators. Enjoy lightweight, pure gameplay with global board games, puzzles and brain challenges. Supports local multiplayer & offline play for solo time, family fun and friend gatherings.

name: Goo Deer
short_description: Goo Deer is a dark, first-person gas station management game set in a foggy world addicted to the strange drink Goo Deer. name: Kitty Krush
